query: UPDATE project_amenities SET imageUrl = CASE name WHEN 'Swimming Pool' THEN '/images/amenities/swimming-pool.jpg' WHEN 'Gymnasium' THEN '/images/amenities/gym.jpg' WHEN 'Clubhouse' THEN '/images/amenities/clubhouse.jpg' WHEN 'Landscaped Gardens' THEN '/images/amenities/garden.jpg' WHEN 'Children Play Area' THEN '/images/amenities/garden-lounge.jpg' ELSE imageUrl END WHERE projectId = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3wsSeNnMFw5dboG.2c4b3d36d2f1 --database aSHZEBwUmWTuA7HAwuTg3z --execute UPDATE project_amenities SET imageUrl = CASE name WHEN 'Swimming Pool' THEN '/images/amenities/swimming-pool.jpg' WHEN 'Gymnasium' THEN '/images/amenities/gym.jpg' WHEN 'Clubhouse' THEN '/images/amenities/clubhouse.jpg' WHEN 'Landscaped Gardens' THEN '/images/amenities/garden.jpg' WHEN 'Children Play Area' THEN '/images/amenities/garden-lounge.jpg' ELSE imageUrl END WHERE projectId = 1;
